ab: yakay ku tangea ku kaka ka sawvalay, sia Kaku taramangealenga si vaeva ku caylini.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kaku，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Kaku, he is 11 years old.

ab: ykaynay ki tayngea ki gaku bingkingkiw.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: kunaku si kaka ka sawvalay taramadalame nay senay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madalamaku lrededepe, lukatatelradhane maredele nay ka wacekecekele lrededepe.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: madalamaku silaliali sitalrailragi lrikarededelenay seasenay si lrededepe.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
